zh.lifeSummary: 當Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar於1129年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴時，她的父親Gospatric III of Dunbar39歲，母親Ada Caenmore of Scotland29歲。她於大約1149年與Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1179年8月20日在她的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar于1129年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴时，她的父亲Gospatric III of Dunbar39岁，母亲Ada Caenmore of Scotland29岁。她于大约1149年与Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1179年8月20日在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Aline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In the Middle Ages this represented a contracted form of Adeline . In modern use it is either a revival of this or a respelling of Aileen . In Scotland and Ireland it has sometimes been chosen as representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic vocabulary word àlainn (Scottish), álainn (Irish), meaning ‘lovely’.

en.lifeSummary: When Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar was born in 1129, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Gospatric III of Dunbar, was 39 and her mother, Ada Caenmore of Scotland, was 29. She married Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar about 1149, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 August 1179, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar est née en 1129, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Gospatric III of Dunbar, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ada Caenmore of Scotland, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar environ 1149, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 août 1179, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar 1129 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gospatric III of Dunbar 39 und ihre Mutter Ada Caenmore of Scotland 29. Sie hat um 1149 in Scotland Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. August 1179 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar è nata il nel 1129 nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Gospatric III of Dunbar, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ada Caenmore of Scotland, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar circa 1149, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 agosto 1179, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aline MacCrinan of Dunbarが1129年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで生まれた時，父Gospatric III of Dunbarは39歳，母Ada Caenmore of Scotlandは29歳であった。約1149年にスコットランドでWaltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1179年8月20日に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar(이)가 1129년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gospatric III of Dunbar(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada Caenmore of Scotland(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1149년 스컷랜드에서 Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1179년 8월 20일 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar nasceu em 1129, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gospatric III of Dunbar, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ada Caenmore of Scotland, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar aproximadamente 1149, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1179, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar родилась в 1129 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gospatric III of Dunbar было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada Caenmore of Scotland, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar около 1149 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 августа 1179 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aline MacCrinan of Dunbar nació en 1129, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Gospatric III of Dunbar, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ada Caenmore of Scotland, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Waltheof 3rd Earl of Dunbar aproximadamente 1149, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1179, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
